Let X^2 = ^$\frac{1}{2}Y$ = $4\left(\frac{1}{8}\right) Y$ ...(i)

i.e., X = 0, $Y=\frac{1}{8}$
$\Rightarrow x+\frac{1}{4}=0, y+\frac{1}{8}=\frac{1}{8}$
$\Rightarrow x=-\frac{1}{4}$, y = 0
